original_final_question: Among Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, and Montgomery counties, which county is part of the under-900,000 population group (2020 census) and is listed as part of West Texas? Return the county name only. Your response should be in the format [Answer].
reasoning_chain_text:
1. From Bexar, El Paso, Hidalgo, and Montgomery, keep counties with 2020 census population under 900,000.
2. From that subset, identify the county listed as part of West Texas and return only the county name.
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: 2020 population under 900,000 -> El Paso, Hidalgo, Montgomery
HOP 2 (d=1, Wikipedia - node 2 depends on hop 1):
Node 2: West Texas list includes El Paso -> El Paso
